interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including featured services, highlighted resources, and contact snippet.

interfaces.name: getServicesOverview
interfaces.description: Get overview of major care service categories for the Services Overview page.

interfaces.name: getOvernightCareServicePageData
interfaces.description: Get content and configuration for the Overnight Care service page, including plan calculator defaults and popular plans.

careService.description: Serialized CareService entity for Overnight Care.

interfaces.name: searchOvernightCarePlans
interfaces.description: Search for Overnight Care plans matching desired start date, visit frequency, budget, and sort order.

interfaces.name: requestOvernightCarePlan
interfaces.description: Submit a request for a specific Overnight Care plan with desired start date, frequency, and budget.

parameters.name: maxBudgetPerNight
parameters.description: Maximum budget per night to be recorded with the request.

interfaces.name: getMemoryDementiaCarePageData
interfaces.description: Get content and dementia care package list for the Memory & Dementia Care service page.

careService.description: Serialized CareService entity for Memory & Dementia Care.

interfaces.name: compareDementiaCarePackages
interfaces.description: Compare two dementia care packages side-by-side and identify the cheaper package.

interfaces.name: selectDementiaCarePackage
interfaces.description: Select a dementia care package and schedule a start date, creating a CarePackageSelection.

parameters.name: selectedStartDate
parameters.description: Selected package start date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: getCaregiverFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the Find a Caregiver page such as languages, experience, rating, and distance options.

interfaces.name: searchCaregivers
interfaces.description: Search for caregivers near a ZIP code with filters for distance, languages, experience, and rating.

interfaces.name: favoriteCaregiver
interfaces.description: Add a caregiver to the single-user favorites/shortlist.

interfaces.name: unfavoriteCaregiver
interfaces.description: Remove a caregiver from the single-user favorites/shortlist.

interfaces.name: getFavoriteCaregivers
interfaces.description: Get the list of caregivers currently in the single-user favorites/shortlist.

interfaces.name: getBookableServices
interfaces.description: Get list of services that can be booked via the Book a Visit flow.

interfaces.name: searchAvailableVisitTimeSlots
interfaces.description: Search for available visit time slots for a given service, date, duration, and required specialization.

parameters.name: durationMinutes
parameters.description: Desired visit duration in minutes, e.g., 120.

interfaces.name: selectVisitTimeSlotForGuestBooking
interfaces.description: Select a specific time slot to proceed to the guest booking flow. Stores selection in internal state.

interfaces.name: getGuestBookingSummary
interfaces.description: Get a summary of the currently selected visit for the guest booking and confirmation page.

interfaces.name: confirmGuestBookingAsGuest
interfaces.description: Confirm the currently selected visit by providing guest contact details, creating a Booking.

interfaces.name: lookupBookingByConfirmation
interfaces.description: Lookup an existing booking using booking/confirmation number and client last name for Manage Bookings.

interfaces.name: getRescheduleOptionsForBooking
interfaces.description: Get available time slots on a new date for rescheduling an existing booking.

parameters.name: newVisitDate
parameters.description: Target date for reschedule in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

interfaces.name: rescheduleBooking
interfaces.description: Reschedule an existing booking to a selected new time slot.

interfaces.name: getActiveAssessmentQuestions
interfaces.description: Get the active care needs assessment questions and options for the assessment quiz.

interfaces.name: submitAssessmentResponsesAndGetRecommendations
interfaces.description: Submit answers for the care needs assessment and get recommended services and summary.

selectedOptionId.description: ID of selected option if applicable.

freeTextAnswer.description: Free text answer if answer_type is 'free_text'.

interfaces.name: getConsultationTimeSlotsForAssessment
interfaces.description: Get available phone or video consultation time slots for scheduling after an assessment.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Consultation channel, e.g., 'phone' or 'video'. Defaults to 'phone'.

interfaces.name: bookConsultationFromAssessment
interfaces.description: Book a consultation time slot tied to the most recent assessment result.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for Resources & Blog page, including categories, date ranges, and sort options.

interfaces.name: searchArticles
interfaces.description: Search and filter articles by category, date range, sort order, and optional query.

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full article content and related articles for the Article Detail page.

parameters.name: articleSlug
parameters.description: Slug from URL for the article.

interfaces.name: saveArticle
interfaces.description: Save/bookmark an article to the single-user saved resources collection.

interfaces.name: getSavedArticles
interfaces.description: Get the list of articles saved/bookmarked by the single user.

interfaces.name: getArticleShareLink
interfaces.description: Get the shareable URL for a specific article so the UI can copy it to the clipboard.

interfaces.name: getCareCostEstimatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the Care Cost Estimator including available services and base hourly rates.

interfaces.name: buildWeeklyCarePlanEstimate
interfaces.description: Build or update a weekly care plan estimate from selected services and hours per week. Internally manages the current estimate state.

interfaces.name: submitEstimateRequest
interfaces.description: Submit an estimate request using the current weekly care plan estimate and contact details.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Us page including mission, values, team, and accreditations.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information for the Contact Us page including phone numbers, emails, address, and guidance.

interfaces.name: submitContactInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact inquiry from the Contact Us form.

interfaces.name: getFaqContent
interfaces.description: Get FAQs for the FAQs page, grouped into sections.

interfaces.name: getPrivacyPolicyContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Privacy Policy page.

interfaces.name: getTermsOfServiceContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Terms of Service page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCurrentWeeklyEstimate
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the current WeeklyCarePlanEstimate for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _setCurrentWeeklyEstimateId
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to store the current WeeklyCarePlanEstimate id for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentGuestBookingSelection
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the currently selected TimeSlot and service for guest booking.

helperFunctions.name: _setCurrentAssessmentResultId
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to store the most recent AssessmentResult id for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getCurrentUserFavorites
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve or initialize the single user's favorite caregivers and saved articles.
